productDisplayName: Peter England Men Leather Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions : 9 cm x 12 cmMade of black leatherFour main compartmentsTwo insert pocketsOne zippered pocketThree card slots insideOne id card holderBrand name appliqued on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
